name: Oil Tanker Truck Transport
description: Driving a monster truck is awesome and thrilling! You have to be careful with every operation! How about driving a truck on the cliff edge? In Oil Tanker Truck Transport you have to face this challenge! You are a truck driver, and you have to reach the finish line! Tough mountain roads and tight lanes are your challenges! Can you do this risky mission? Many truck types and levels are ready for you to beat! Play this game! Have fun!
tags: 3D, Boys, Car, Girls, Kids, monstertruck, Truck
